narrative:
Pleasant Township has 4,717 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
